name: v3.0.1
body:
> [!IMPORTANT]  
> v3.0.0 was pulled due to missing .jar file on GitHub publish, which prevented Brew publish from working. v3.0.1 is identical to v3.0.0.

## What's Changed
* [v3] build: start new dev cycle (3.0.0-SNAPSHOT) by @iBotPeaches in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3882
* [v3] Remove aapt1 testing by @iBotPeaches in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3883
* refactor: Apktool Remastered by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3885
* organize: classes by context by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3886
* refactor: ResChunkPullParser + BinaryDataInputStream by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3888
* optimize: performance and sanity by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3890
* Fix: correct bad Windows aapt2 builds by @iBotPeaches in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3992
* fix: improve ResAttribute value formatting by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3994
* build(deps): bump com.google.guava:guava from 33.4.8-jre to 33.5.0-jre by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3990
* chore: shorten version logic by @iBotPeaches in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3999
* fix: support building on headless server by @iBotPeaches in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4000
* build(deps): bump org.apache.commons:commons-lang3 from 3.18.0 to 3.19.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/3998
* Use binary name "aapt2" as prefix for temporary file by @jpstotz in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4001
* build(deps): bump gradle/actions from 4.4.3 to 5.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4003
* build(deps): bump github/codeql-action from 3 to 4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4011
* build(deps): bump org.xmlunit:xmlunit-legacy from 2.10.4 to 2.11.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4017
* build(deps): bump actions/upload-artifact from 4 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4018
* build(deps): bump commons-io:commons-io from 2.20.0 to 2.21.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4021
* build(deps): bump org.apache.commons:commons-lang3 from 3.19.0 to 3.20.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4026
* build(deps): bump commons-cli:commons-cli from 1.10.0 to 1.11.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4025
* build: move to smali fork by @iBotPeaches in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4027
* build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4033
* build(deps): bump com.android.tools:r8 from 8.7.18 to 8.13.17 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4031
* refactor: Improve renaming/injection of resources in stripped APKs by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4041
* chore: update default --res-resolve-mode in usage by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4042
* fix: rename injected entry spec if the name already exists by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4043
* build(deps): bump org.apache.commons:commons-text from 1.14.0 to 1.15.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4038
* refactor: modernize --res-resolve-mode and dummies by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4044
* chore: clean leftovers from 2.x by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4045
* fix: handle unknown res configs gracefully by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4053
* build(deps): bump actions/upload-artifact from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4050
* fix: tighten span tag parsing by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4061
* fix: avoid assumptions about res dir by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4067
* refactor: nested dex + replace --only-main-classes with -a/--all-src by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4069
* refactor: source and tests by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4071
* chore: promote -a/--all-src to a common option by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4072
* build(deps): bump com.android.tools:r8 from 8.13.17 to 8.13.19 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4064
* refactor: new BinaryXmlResourceParser, ResXmlSerializer and more by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4077
* minor: TextUtils hotfix by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4079
* build: migrate to modern maven publish by @iBotPeaches in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4073
* build(deps): bump gradle/actions from 5.0.0 to 5.0.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4080
* fix: ensure proper locale in ResPrimitive by @salvogiangri in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4084
* feat: support for API 36.1 (Baklava) by @iBotPeaches in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4082
* feat: staged aliases support by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4085
* fix: framework parse performed twice by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4086
* chore: final polish by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4087
* feat: support multi-dex containers by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4091
* build(deps): bump com.android.tools:r8 from 8.13.19 to 9.0.32 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4090
* build: bump gradle from 8.7 to 8.14.4 by @IgorEisberg in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4088
* build: version 3.0.0 tagged by @iBotPeaches in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4093
* docs: mark v3 as real and fix sponsor images by @iBotPeaches in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4095

## New Contributors
* @jpstotz made their first contribution in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4001
* @salvogiangri made their first contribution in https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/pull/4084

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iBotPeaches/Apktool/compare/v2.12.1...v3.0.1
